data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding the service menu display on Google.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement that the 'Service menu displayed on Google' is satisfied. However, the provided evidence does not include any checks or confirmations related to this specific requirement. While there are multiple successful prior steps, none of them address the display of the service menu on Google, indicating a clear gap in the evidence needed to satisfy the requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming that the service menu is displayed on Google.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for service menu display
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the service menu is correctly displayed on Google Business Profile.
